conn = sqlite3.connect\('saude_real.db'\)

        print\(f'{t}: {c.fetchone\(\)[0]} rows'\)
    except Exception as e: print\(f'{t}: {e}'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

conn = sqlite3.connect\('saude_real.db'\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)

c.execute\('SELECT id_aih, prontuario, data_ent, data_sai, competencia FROM aih_records LIMIT 5'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== PROCEDIMENTOS sample ==='\)

for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== COMPETENCIAS ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT competencia FROM aih_records ORDER BY competencia'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== PACIENTES sample ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT cns, nome, cidade FROM pacientes LIMIT 5'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)
conn.close\(\))

Bash(cd "D:/Documentos/saude" && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('saude_real.db'\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)

print\('=== TABLES ==='\)
c.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\)
print\(c.fetchall\(\)\)

print\('\\n=== SAMPLE aih_records ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT * FROM aih_records LIMIT 3'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== SAMPLE aih_procedimentos ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT * FROM aih_procedimentos LIMIT 5'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== ALL sigtap_metadata ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT proc_cod, competencia, nome, s_hosp, t_hosp, s_prof, s_amb, t_amb FROM sigtap_metadata'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== COUNTS ==='\)
for t in ['pacientes','aih_records','aih_procedimentos','sigtap_metadata']:
    c.execute\(f'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM {t}'\)
    print\(f'{t}: {c.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)

print\('\\n=== SAMPLE pacientes ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT cns, nome, cidade, estado FROM pacientes LIMIT 3'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

print\('\\n=== data_ent/data_sai check ==='\)
c.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM aih_records WHERE data_ent != '' AND data_ent IS NOT NULL\\"\)
print\(f'Records with data_ent: {c.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
c.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM aih_records WHERE data_sai != '' AND data_sai IS NOT NULL\\"\)
print\(f'Records with data_sai: {c.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)

print\('\\n=== UNIQUE proc codes ==='\)
c.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT proc_cod FROM aih_procedimentos'\)
for r in c.fetchall\(\): print\(r\)

conn.close\(\)
")
